cityDNA.coreFantasy: A giant mountain-valley city where lock houses, granaries, relief halls, healing courts, training arenas, sky-stairs, and memory-tablet government make scale protective rather than merely huge.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Tormund Vale is not a generic giant city; the uploaded views show waterworks, food systems, public care, healing, and arena discipline organized at giant scale.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Tormund Vale turns mountain water, grain, relief, healing, training, and public memory into a giant civic order built to carry others.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Granite terraces, river canals, lock houses, waterwheels, grain halls, relief plazas, healing basins, blue beacon lamps, woven banners, titan-scale stairs, and the broken-cloud sky-stair hall.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Giant civic culture where strength is measured by infrastructure, memory keeping, public aid, and disciplined readiness.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Sky-stairs, lock wheels, water reflections, grain halls, relief lanterns, healing basins, champion gates, and memory tablets symbolize scale turned into duty.

canonLocks: Tormund Vale is a mature giant mountain-valley city, not merely oversized buildings.
The Wonder is Giant Sky-Stair Hall of the Broken Cloud.
The Beacon is Lock House Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Memory Tablet Walls Colossus Registry.
The five primary districts are Canal / Riverworks, Granary / Food Market, Civic Services, Medical / Healing, and Arena / Training.

Exact uploaded anchors include Canal / Riverworks Civic Hall, Lock House Beacon, Canal Reflections Monument, Waterwheel Court Nook, Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, Grain Hall, Awning Monument, Mill Court Nook, Civic Services Hall, Relief Hall, Civic Services Lantern Monument, Notice Plaza Nook, Medical / Healing Civic Hall, Healing Hall, Medical Healing Lantern Monument, Apothecary Court Nook, Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, and Champion Gate Nook.
provisionalCanon: Tormund Vale's highest civic virtue is carrying public burdens.
The image pass reinforces water, grain, care, and training systems at giant scale.
rejectedReads: arena strength detached from care systems
cautionFlags: Preserve exact uploaded sidecar anchor names.
Keep waterworks, food, relief, healing, and training visible together.
Use giant scale through civic function rather than empty size.

environment.environmentalLogic: Valley water is movement, grain, public care, and risk; the city governs it through locks, mills, relief halls, and memory records.

forms: Giant Sky-Stair Hall of the Broken Cloud

civilization.people: Giant citizens are deliberate, public-minded, and accustomed to moving through enormous shared infrastructure without losing tenderness.
civilization.governance: The Colossus Registry records duties, water obligations, relief claims, healing records, grain tallies, and training honors.
civilization.religion: Sky-stair rites, memory-tablet names, water blessings, and public burden vows make endurance sacred-adjacent.

streets.appearance: Massive river-valley streets connect locks, grain halls, relief plazas, healing courts, and arena terraces with giant-scale stairs and blue signal lamps.
streets.movement: Movement follows the named civic anchors, district paths, formal approaches, service routes, and public thresholds visible in the uploaded street views.
streets.lighting: District identity is carried through civic blue signal light, warm lanterns, sun or moon conditions, and landmark-specific glows.
streets.weatherEffects: Weather changes visibility, route choice, and the meaning of public shelter, thresholds, and signals.
streets.dayCycle: Daytime emphasizes public work, markets, courts, services, and institutional movement.
streets.nightCycle: Night emphasizes guarded signals, lantern routes, quiet institutional labor, and district-specific rituals.

housing.wealthy: Prestige housing near courts, high terraces, or landmark approaches, marked by huge thresholds, river views, and tablet alcoves.
housing.middle: Shop, guild, service, and official households along civic streets and district corridors.
housing.poor: Crowded service housing near work routes, public wells, lower markets, and practical civic infrastructure.

districts.name: Canal / Riverworks
districts.civicPurpose: Water routing, flood response, locks, and signal coordination.
districts.visualIdentity: Canal / Riverworks Civic Hall, Lock House Beacon, Canal Reflections Monument, Waterwheel Court Nook.

districts.name: Granary / Food Market
districts.civicPurpose: Food security, grain storage, milling, and accountable markets.
districts.visualIdentity: Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, Grain Hall, Awning Monument, Mill Court Nook.

districts.name: Civic Services
districts.civicPurpose: Public aid, relief records, notices, and civic coordination.
districts.visualIdentity: Civic Services Hall, Relief Hall, Civic Services Lantern Monument, Notice Plaza Nook.

districts.name: Medical / Healing
districts.civicPurpose: Recovery, triage, public care, and herbal medicine.
districts.visualIdentity: Medical / Healing Civic Hall, Healing Hall, Medical Healing Lantern Monument, Apothecary Court Nook.

districts.name: Arena / Training
districts.civicPurpose: Disciplined strength, readiness, public tests, and champion memory.
districts.visualIdentity: Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, Champion Gate Nook.

wonder.name: Giant Sky-Stair Hall of the Broken Cloud
wonder.symbolicRole: Ascent, burden, weather, and giant endurance made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Far skyline hall climbing into broken cloud above the mountain-valley city.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide rites, public vows, memory ceremonies, and sky-weather gatherings.
storyHooks: A sky-stair oath decides who carries the valley through crisis.

beacon.name: Lock House Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Water control and public warning made signal.
beacon.visualRole: Blue-lit beacon among lock houses, canals, and waterwheel routes.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates waterworks, grain halls, relief, healing, and arena response.
storyHooks: A Beacon change makes every lock decide what the city saves first.

seatOfPower.name: Memory Tablet Walls Colossus Registry
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Names, duties, and memory made law.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central registry of tablet walls, terraces, and giant-scale approaches.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Government for water, grain, relief, healing, training, and public records.
storyHooks: A duty carved into stone is too large to ignore.

majorLandmarks.name: Grain Hall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, Grain Hall, Awning Monument, Mill Court Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Food security, grain storage, milling, and accountable markets.
storyHooks: A scene at Grain Hall tests how Tormund Vale turns its ideals into public duty.
